0.q: GABA-T is the main GABA-degrading enzyme in the GABA shunt pathway... the MuGABA-T gene plays a pivotal role in GABA catabolism.

1.q: GABA-transaminase (GABA-T) is the main GABA-degrading enzyme in the GABA shunt pathway... the content of GABA was reduced in the transgenic MuGABA-T Arabidopsis plants
